inputs.label: Input Unit (0: acres, 1: hectares)
inputs.businessContext: Select input unit: 0 for acres, 1 for hectares.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select input unit: 0 for acres, 1 for hectares.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Eingabeeinheit: 0 für Acres, 1 für Hektar.

businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione la unidad de entrada: 0 para acres, 1 para hectáreas.

inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (ha/ac)
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from acres to hectares (default: 1 ac = 0.40468564224 ha).
